compiled_state.title: Create integration test file tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Create a new integration test file tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh with 5 acceptance criteria tests. Also update .test-index to add this file to the existing coverage-map entry for SKILL.md.

## File Impact
- tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh (NEW FILE)
- .test-index (append to existing line for plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md)

## TDD Requirement
testing_mode: RED
These integration tests verify cross-story acceptance criteria against the final SKILL.md. They will FAIL until all 4 SKILL.md stories (2ea1-8454, 6d81-e870, d51a-5b1c, 018f-a01a) are implemented.
TDD exemption: structural boundary tests per Rule 5 (non-executable LLM instruction file).

## Tests to Implement

test_criterion_a_auto_single_confirm:
  - greps '--auto' AND 'single.*confirmation' in SKILL.md
  - Both must be present

test_criterion_b_standard_batched_summary:
  - greps 'summary.*artifact' in SKILL.md

test_criterion_c_adrs_generated:
  - greps 'always generate.*adr' in SKILL.md

test_criterion_d_rerun_no_overwrite:
  - greps 'append-only' in SKILL.md
  - (Only append-only — not idempotency, reserved for criterion_e)

test_criterion_e_idempotency:
  - greps 'dedup|deduplication' AND 'idempotent|idempotency' in SKILL.md
  - Both must be present

## File Template
```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh
# Integration tests verifying cross-story acceptance criteria for architect-foundation UX improvements.
# All 5 criteria must pass simultaneously once all story tasks are implemented.

set -uo pipefail
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PLUGIN_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/../.." && pwd)"
DSO_PLUGIN_DIR="$PLUGIN_ROOT/plugins/dso"
SKILL_MD="$DSO_PLUGIN_DIR/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md"
source "$PLUGIN_ROOT/tests/lib/assert.sh"
echo "=== test-architect-foundation-integration.sh ==="
# ... test functions ...
print_summary
```

## .test-index Update
Find the EXISTING line in .test-index that maps plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md as source (approximately line 63). It currently ends with something like 'tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-skill.sh'. Append ',tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh' to that line (comma-separated, no space).
DO NOT add a new standalone line — only modify the existing coverage-map entry.

## Post-Creation Steps
Run: chmod +x tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh

## Verification
Run bash tests/skills/test-architect-foundation-integration.sh — all 5 tests must FAIL (RED).
